name: io.github.xiaolai/codex-octopus
description: Spawn multiple specialized Codex agents as MCP servers, each independently configured.

environmentVariables.name: CODEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (leave unset to inherit from parent process)

environmentVariables.name: CODEX_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model: gpt-5-codex, o3, codex-1, or full ID

environmentVariables.name: CODEX_APPEND_INSTRUCTIONS
environmentVariables.description: Additional instructions appended to the default

environmentVariables.name: CODEX_FACTORY_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose only the factory wizard tool
